dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Huh? What's this? I died, didn't I? Hit by a truck, just like in those webnovels. And then... I woke up.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Woke up as a baby. A baby named Athanasia de Alger Obelia. The abandoned princess from the novel 'Lovely Princess' who was executed by her own father, Emperor Claude.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It's been... ten years since then. Ten years of living in this gilded cage, the Ruby Palace. Ten years of knowing my eventual fate: death at the hands of my father, the tyrant emperor.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: All because his 'true' daughter, Jennette, appeared, and I became an inconvenient stain on his perfect family.

dialogue.speaker: Athanasia
dialogue.line: (Muttering to herself) "Another day, another opportunity to... acquire assets."

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Survival isn't about being a good princess. It's about being a rich princess. A princess who can run away and live a long, luxurious life far from the palace.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLINK

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: These jewels I've been 'borrowing' from the palace decorations won't last forever, but it's a start. Every little bit counts when you're planning a grand escape.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The original Athanasia died when she was eighteen. I'm ten now. Eight years left. Eight years to avoid meeting Claude. Eight years to avoid his wrath. Eight years to escape.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He's a cold-blooded killer. He wouldn't hesitate to kill his own daughter. The novel made that painfully clear. His golden eyes, devoid of warmth, staring down at the trembling princess...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP-THUMP

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Just thinking about it makes my heart pound. Even after all these years, the fear is real.

dialogue.speaker: Lilian York
dialogue.line: Princess, please don't wander off too far. The Emperor's guards patrol these grounds, and it's best to stay within the Ruby Palace walls.

dialogue.speaker: Athanasia
dialogue.line: Oh, Lily! I was just admiring the flowers. They're so pretty!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Lily is one of the few kind souls here. She probably pities me. Good. Pity is useful. It keeps me fed and clothed, at least.

dialogue.speaker: Lilian York
dialogue.line: (Sighing softly) Yes, Princess. But still, for your safety...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Stay within the walls? And wait for my execution? No thank you. The original Athanasia waited. I won't make that mistake.

dialogue.speaker: Athanasia
dialogue.line: Understood, Lily! I'll be a good girl.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A good girl who's secretly plotting her escape. I've only ever seen him from afar, a fleeting glimpse of gold and black. And that was enough to send shivers down my spine.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He's like a walking iceberg. Or a ticking time bomb. And I'm the unfortunate soul standing right next to it. But I won't be like the original Athanasia. I won't beg for his love. I'll survive. I have to.

dialogue.speaker: Athanasia
dialogue.line: (Looking out a window, determined) "I will survive."

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The first step is to never, ever cross paths with Emperor Claude. That's my golden rule. My only rule.

summary: Athanasia, a reincarnated woman, reflects on her new life as the abandoned princess destined for execution by her father, Emperor Claude. She resolves to survive and escape her tragic fate by secretly hoarding wealth and avoiding any contact with the Emperor.
